name: open-elements-hiero
description: Open Elements marketplace for Hiero/Hedera-focused Claude Code plugins.

plugins.name: agentic-support-hiero
plugins.description: Claude Code plugin focused on Hiero and Hedera: background-knowledge skills for the Hiero project and the Hedera network, a skill for deploying local test networks with the solo CLI, and the Hedera documentation MCP server.
